title: Adapter Lifecycle Event
description: Lifecycle state event emitted by adapter per PROTOCOL.md §7 and V1.1 §20.1. additionalProperties=false for fail-closed. Legal transitions defined in PROTOCOL §7 transition table.

Lifecycle events MUST conform to PROTOCOL §7 transition table. Business-layer validation MUST reject transitions not in the whitelist. FAILED is terminal for the current instance; recovery MUST create new session_id and start from LOADING.
